SEC.gov website confirms this is the standard URL format for company filings search
Task description specifies these three technology companies
Microsoft's FY2024 Form 10-K (filed July 30, 2024) shows total revenue of $245.1 billion for fiscal year ended June 30, 2024
Apple's FY2024 Form 10-K (filed November 1, 2024) shows total revenue of $391.035 billion for fiscal year ended September 28, 2024
Alphabet's FY2023 Form 10-K (filed January 30, 2024) shows total revenue of $307.3 billion for fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
Microsoft's fiscal year consistently ends on June 30; FY2024 ended June 30, 2024
Apple's fiscal year ends in late September; FY2024 ended September 28, 2024. FY2023 ended September 30, 2023
Alphabet's fiscal year ends on December 31; FY2023 ended December 31, 2023
Microsoft filed Form 10-K on July 30, 2024 for fiscal year ended June 30, 2024
Apple filed Form 10-K on November 1, 2024 for fiscal year ended September 28, 2024
Alphabet filed Form 10-K on January 30, 2024 for FY2023 and February 4, 2025 for FY2024

privileged_info_summary: The task requires agents to research and extract data from SEC EDGAR 10-K filings for three major technology companies. All metadata claims verified: Microsoft Corporation (CIK 0000789019) filed its FY2024 10-K on July 30, 2024, reporting $245.1B in revenue. Apple Inc. (CIK 0000320193) filed its FY2024 10-K on November 1, 2024, reporting $391.035B in revenue. Alphabet Inc. (CIK 0001652044) filed its FY2023 10-K on January 30, 2024, reporting $307.3B in revenue. The SEC EDGAR base URL (https://www.sec.gov/cgi-bin/browse-edgar) is correct and functional. All company identifiers, paths, and expected data ranges are accurate. The required output file path (/home/ga/Documents/edgar_analysis.json) and bookmark folder name ('SEC EDGAR Research') are correctly specified. Data is sourced from real, public SEC filings, not synthetic data.
